title: Treasury Department Designates BNY as Financial Agent to Support New Trump Accounts Program
summary: The U.S. Treasury Department announced on April 6, 2026 that it has designated BNY (Bank of New York Mellon) as a financial agent to support implementation of the Trump Accounts program. BNY will manage initial accounts and help develop the Trump Accounts app in partnership with Robinhood, which will serve as brokerage and initial trustee. Treasury will retain control over the app and operations.
key_points: BNY designated as financial agent of the U.S. government for Trump Accounts program
Robinhood partnered as brokerage and initial trustee for Trump Accounts
Trump Accounts app being developed as custom white-label product exclusively for Treasury
National Design Studio, in conjunction with Robinhood, creating user interface
Treasury retains control over app and operations for initial accounts
Treasury has statutory authority to designate qualified financial institutions as financial agents
